Information_Security_Manager_Name: The name of the Information Security Manager.
Contribution_Date: The date when the contribution to the sustainability reporting was made.
Contribution_Details: The specific contribution that the Information Security Manager made to the sustainability reporting.
Reduced_GHG_Emission_Percent: The percentage of greenhouse gas emission reduced due to the contribution of the Information Security Manager.
Company_Name: The name of the company for which the sustainability reporting was done.
Quarter_Year: The quarter and year during which the reduced emissions were reported.
